beast_pools.trs: “Honestly, you immediately picture someone who went to a top-tier university, probably an Ivy League school. They'd likely come from a comfortable, upper-middle-class family – maybe a lawyer or doctor parent. Definitely someone who had all the resources they needed growing up…”

beast_pools.trs: Okay, if we're being completely realistic, you'd want someone who blends in easily, potentially someone unassuming. A quiet guy who looks like he wouldn't cause trouble, maybe of Asian descent, good with electronics... you'd need someone strong, maybe a large Black man to handle any physical confrontations, and of course, a smooth-talking leader, probably a white guy to negotiate and handle the getaway
